title: Lint fixes
body:
Another set of fixes for golangci-lint reports. Now, all errors are fixed and we can migrate.

@rhatdan @TomSweeneyRedHat @nalind @saschagrunert PTAL

comments.body: @vrothberg Is this ready for review? I see you still pushin... :innocent:

> @vrothberg Is this ready for review? I see you still pushin... innocent

Ready for review. The repush was to fix a commit message. The CI isn't happy yet, so I still need to massage it a bit. I suspect that some errors should be ignored.

> Should I close out #1666?

I forgot about that entirely, sorry!

> [...] Generally, do you want to add a [config file](https://github.com/golangci/golangci-lint#config-file) to have a reproducible set of linters and options enabled/disabled?

Absolutely, that would be great. We can add that once we migrate the CI to golangci :+1:

> Generally LGTM, I just have some minor things point_down

Thanks a lot for checking :pray:  I fixed the corresponding commits and will push once I figured out why the CI is going south.
The regression is fixed and CI is looking to be green soon. @TomSweeneyRedHat @rhatdan @nalind PTA(final)L

:pushpin: Commit e062e5f has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan e062e5f1c6165fdee6db2476054b4dd8ca20970f -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
Awesome, so now we are unblocked on getting `golangci-lint` in :rocket:
